programme.desc: Mariano Mison, an agent known for his dedication and integrity, earns the NBI's director post because of his service. When the Vizconde family is shockingly massacred, he is tasked to investigate the murders and find the culprit.

programme.title: The Prenup

programme.desc: A DJ and two women become caught in a love triangle.

programme.title: Corazon: Ang Unang Aswang

programme.title: Tong Tatlong Tatay Kong Pakitong Kitong
programme.desc: An orphaned child is not able to find a home; the priest sends her to Manila to live with three bachelors. She gets in harm's way when the boys accidentally pick up a bag of jewels that belongs to criminals.

programme.title: My Ex and Whys

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: When a man falls deeply in love, he's ready to do whatever it takes to win her heart and her father's approval. There's a catch, however. What begins as a simple sacrifice for love soon turns into a game of endurance, secrets and unexpected lessons.

programme.title: The 52nd American Music Awards
programme.desc: The 52nd American Music Awards (AMAs) will be hosted by Queen Latifah from the MGM Grand Garden Arena in Las Vegas. This fan-voted event honor’s the year’s top artists with 50 categories focusing on breakthroughs.

programme.title: Top Chef S23
programme.desc: Top Chef is a hit reality competition series that celebrates the culinary arts with a fascinating window into the competitive, pressurized environment of world-class cookery and the restaurant business at the highest level.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples S17
programme.desc: After the remains of an elderly woman are discovered in Florida, investigators track down suspects with a complex family dynamic. the woman at the center of it tells her story for the first time, revealing details of the harrowing crime.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... In Hollywood
programme.desc: As Hollywood's Golden Age is winding down during the summer of 1969, television actor Rick Dalton and his stunt double Cliff Booth endeavor to achieve lasting success in Hollywood while meeting several colorful characters along the way.

programme.title: Chicago Fire S14
programme.desc: Firehouse 51 is called to an airfield when a passenger jet suddenly goes silent mid-air, triggering a high-stakes emergency. Their discovery cracks open a deadlier mystery - one with consequences that could put countless lives in jeopardy.

programme.title: Chicago P.D. S13
programme.desc: An airport crisis reveals a larger conspiracy tied to a passenger jet, launching the Intelligence Unit into a dangerous chase for the suspect while the FBI watches closely.

programme.title: The 52nd American Music Awards
programme.desc: The 52nd American Music Awards (AMAs) will be hosted by Queen Latifah from the MGM Grand Garden Arena in Las Vegas. This fan-voted event honor’s the year’s top artists with 50 categories focusing on breakthroughs.

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4
programme.desc: As Adam (Sean Giambrone) takes up tennis to win back his best friend, Valentine’s Day sends Erica (Hayley Orrantia) into an emotional tailspin.

programme.title: Britain's Got Talent S19
programme.desc: The nation's most beloved talent competition continues with a new set of thrilling acts performing for the judges and the golden opportunity to perform for the Royal Family

programme.title: Ghosts S5
programme.desc: The story continues for Sam and Jay as they run their Woodstone B&B and restaurant, navigate the ghosts' day-to-day antics, and deal with new life challenges.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid S8
programme.desc: The $100,000 Pyramid Season 8 continues Michael Strahan's hosting, featuring celebrity pairs alongside contestants playing classic word-association rounds to reach the $100,000 Winner's Circle

programme.title: The Agency: Central Intelligence S1
programme.desc: Henry and Martian run diplomatic interference. Danny walks a tightrope.

programme.title: Hotel Costiera
programme.desc: An old woman dies at Villa Costiera. As Daniel helps her son transfer her body to NY, his search for Alice leads to a crucial name: Bruno.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Hosted by Daytime Emmy Award® winning host Steve Harvey, Family Feud brings all new hilarious moments and families as they compete for a chance to win up to $20,000 by guessing the most popular answers to questions posed to 100 people surveyed.

programme.title: The Goldbergs S4
programme.desc: As Adam (Sean Giambrone) takes up tennis to win back his best friend, Valentine’s Day sends Erica (Hayley Orrantia) into an emotional tailspin.

programme.desc: Recruits must unlock a safe in a gas-filled room.

programme.desc: A series of spectacular evil crimes has risen and former super-villain Gru has been recruited to find out who is responsible for them.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes of Grindelwald
programme.desc: Grindelwald escapes custody and Albus Dumbledore enlists his former student Newt Scamander, who agrees to help, unaware of the dangers that lie ahead.

programme.desc: Professor Albus Dumbledore knows the powerful Dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald is moving to seize control of the wizarding world.

programme.desc: Hellboy and a rookie BPRD agent get stranded in 1950s rural Appalachia, only to discover a small community haunted by witches, led by the Crooked Man.

programme.desc: Four misfits struggling with ordinary problems are pulled through a portal into the Overworld.

programme.title: Armor

programme.title: Ben 10 S1

programme.desc: Ben stumbles into Dr. Animo's secret lab - now ruled by his superior mutants, the Alphas - and must help the lesser animals escape while stuck as 'Stinkfly'.

programme.desc: The Valley has the first “try-all” against the Croods to see if Grug stole food for the Broods; Thunk asks Kevin to teach him to be more irresistible

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep cheats her way into being considered an adult; Grug learns he's no longer the strongest caveman and turns to a radical method for building brawn

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Sandy can't join animal wrestling she poses as “Mandy Monkhuahua”; In order to help Munk, Grug sticks super worms up his nose that make him smarter

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: After getting hit on the head, Eep has a vision and sets out to get the Valley to show how thankful they are; Grug feels like he's the biggest joke in Ahhh Valley, so he asks Thunk to make a “buy-o-pic” of him to show people just how truly great he is

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When a Tuckapaw boy is unfairly arrested, Lucky and her friends plan to break him out of jail.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When an earthquake takes out the railroad bridge, the PALs must find a way to stop the oncoming train – which Jim is aboard

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: While Lucky is eager to celebrate her first birthday on the frontier, a surprise visit from her Grandpa stirs up a controversy.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Jim and Kate are getting married... or are they?

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When Butch LePray hold Jim for ransom, Lucky and Spirit team up with the unlikeliest of allies to get her father back

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: The frontier gets a chill when Lucky, Spirit and the PALs attempt to rescue a missing girl

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Mel Shellman gets fired and crashes with the FAST crew, but he's so annoying they try to get him rehired; An old flame shows up, making Chet jealous.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Whiplash takes on the toughest creature around in a MMA-style fight; When the FAST crew is abducted, Skidmark and his conspiracy club get on the case.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald wins a contest and gets the opportunity to spend an entire day with his hero: NITRO NED! But when it turns out Ned is in dire need of a day off, Archibald helps to find him a replacement. / After a lotion related mishap, Archibald accidentally turns himself and his family into younger versions of themselves.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald stumbles into playing the part of a wedding planner as he attempts to help a frazzled groom pull off the perfect day. / Archibald unknowingly buys a haunted toaster and summons a ghost by mistake.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: The girls get summer jobs to help Lucky repair the sprawling house she inherited from her grandfather near the Rosemead Valley Racetrack.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: After fruitless searching the universe for Shiro, the Paladins struggle to accept that they must find a new pilot to join the team

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna decides to show off her not-so-flashy skills as a magician at the Community Center talent show, the Zenkos must do everything they can to save her act from becoming an embarrassing disaster. / After Sam’s favorite skateboard accidentally gets put in with donations Mr. Tanaka is collecting for a fundraiser, the team is led on a merry chase as the skateboard passes from one Harmony Harbor denizen to another.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Mr. Pea helps the Veggies face their fears in an overnight boot camp/Bob and Petunia try to encourage Ichabeezer to stay when he wants to move out

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: LarryBoy and Junior No-pack must investigate when Junior's jetpack is missing/Bob gets jealous when Larry calls Bacon Bill his BFF

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a spaceship that takes off with a sleeping CatRat inside! Gabby, Pandy, and Kitty Fairy have to get the ship back into The Fairy Tail Garden before Floyd (who thinks it's the best kitty toy ever!) gets his paws on it!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: After Magnus accuses Cutter of setting fires near the village that could hurt the sheep, the Riders have to put them out and find the real culprit.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. The Zenkos swing into action to send customers her way. / When Donna, Fawna and Rona have a spat, the triplets’ longstanding annual tradition of viewing a comet together is in jeopardy. Now it’s up to Team Zenko to get the three feuding sisters back together again before the comet streaks by.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: Marcus is having his first sleepover and Phoebe is concerned that Marcus may be nervous so Phoebe sets out to make sure he has the best first sleepover ever. / When Athena’s magical jump rope gets sucked up by the family’s new robot vacuum, she loses confidence in her abilities, only to learn that her real abilities are already inside her.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play Scooch’s favorite board game outside, using the whole town of Pawston as the board. \Tag thinks it’s time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create and perform new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. But when all the cars around Pawston break down because of Frank's shoddy mechanic work, Tag and Scooch have to go around town to fix all his mistakes. \ Scooch wants to be a Tail-kwondo master like his hero, Master Wag, but he can't break a biscuit with his tail. Tag helps train him (and his tail), and they even track down Master Wag who gives Scooch a good luck charm. But when Scooch loses the good luck charm before his tail-kwondo test, he needs to find a way to believe in himself.

programme.desc: Gangsters pursue a Hong Kong lawman framed for murder and a lawyer they believe is linked to laundered money.

programme.desc: Three lighthouse keepers on the remote Flannan Isles find a hidden trunk of gold that becomes the catalyst to a struggle for survival

programme.desc: A psychological horror story about dark secrets destroying people and their families from the inside out.

programme.title: Safehouse
programme.desc: Carla lives and works in Mexicali, Mexico. After her brother is killed, she's forced to run. In the desert of Imperial Valley, she's now trapped in a deadly game between the CIA, government Informants, and the cartel.

programme.title: By Quantum Physics: A Nightlife Venture
programme.desc: The story is about a night club owner Lee Chan-woo, his club manager Seong Eun-yeong, and police reporter Park ki-hum that fights with an organized crime which involved alleged drug abuse and police corruption.

programme.title: Prison on Fire
programme.desc: Inside a Chinese prison two inmates form a friendship and face the difficulty of life on the inside.

programme.title: Cell
programme.desc: When a mysterious cell phone signal causes apocalyptic chaos, an artist is determined to reunite with his young son in New England.

programme.title: Kruel
programme.desc: A psychotic killer masquerades as an ice cream man in order to get closer to the objects of his affection.

programme.title: Cheese, a Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim’s final stop is beautiful British Columbia, Canada’s West coast, where an innovative cheese culture is driven by its ‘support local’ mentality.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw arrives in his mum's home town of Beijing to begin a culinary, historical and personal journey through the ancient country of China.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam visits the beautiful, mountainous province of Anhui, home to one of the eight great regional cuisines of China. Anhui cuisine is hearty, peasant food that uses seasonal, wild produce from the mountains.

programme.title: Evolving Vegan
programme.desc: A diverse group of chefs create mouth-watering plant-based dumplings, fried `chik'n' sandwiches and Vietnamese `catfish'; Mena forages for lobster mushrooms and visits the oldest tofu factory in America.

programme.title: Evolving Vegan
programme.desc: Mena explores his Canadian backyard, discovering delicious plant-based sushi, pistachio cannolis, and pizza; he gets hands-on at a vegan cheese factory with comedian Bassem Youssef.

programme.title: Evolving Vegan
programme.desc: In a frenzy of mezcal and spice, Mena devours a host of local delicacies: plant-based seafood, agua chile and classic enfrijoladas. Later, Mena joins a local abuela to make traditional moles.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam's journey to explore China's history through its food continues, as he visits the provinces of Jiangsu and Zhejiang, both considered part of the 8 great regional cuisines of China and celebrated for their wealth and sophistication.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw arrives in one of the largest cities in the world Shanghai where he discovers a modern, cosmopolitan and global facing city.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: On his journey discovering China's history through its food, Adam arrives in Shandong - birthplace of Confucius and one of the oldest and most influential culinary traditions in China.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw arrives in one of the most fascinating Chinese provinces - Yunnan. Infused with spice and fragrance from Southeast and Central Asia, people from all around China have fallen in love with this cuisine and culture.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw arrives to the fiery provinces of Sichuan and Hunan and this time he's joined by celebrated chef and author Fuchsia Dunlop who is an expert on the region.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw is in Fujian - a place with a long history of migration where the movement of people left an enduring mark that manifested in its food and culture.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw heads to the home of Cantonese cuisine - Hong Kong and Guangdong to discover the regional cuisine that spread to all corners of the world.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw's last stop is the very special Hainan Island - a balmy, tropical island and Adam's ancestral home.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: When winter arrives, temperatures plummet and food becomes scarce. But some animals have evolved unique adaptations to flourish in the world’s most cold and barren landscapes.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: These animals live in the extremes but have created ingenious tools and techniques to cope with the harshest challenges to their continued survival.

programme.title: Wildest Survival S2
programme.desc: From birth life is filled with risk - and reward. To reach adulthood, animals must constantly overcome incredible obstacles. They must learn to find food, secure a home, attract a mate, and raise the next generation with only one thing on their mind - staying alive.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: Meet some late-life lovers and explore the reasons behind their sexual longevity and their ability to reproduce well into their later years.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: What does it take to maintain alpha status as animals grow older? We investigate the responsibilities and challenges that come with being a senior leader of a pack.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: We explore the integral role that older animals play in their communities and investigate how animals learn over the course of their lives.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: Human, plant, animal, bacteria, all have one inevitable thing in common; death. In this episode we discover the ways in which aging animals defy our usual understanding of the circle of life.

programme.title: Islands of Creation
programme.desc: In the jungles of a remote archipelago in the South Pacific, a biologist is attempting to do something Charles Darwin and Ernst Mayr never accomplished: catch evolution in the act of creating new species. Albert Uy is on the verge of an amazing discovery in the Solomon Islands, but there's a threat looming on the horizon.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: In this episode we meet some animal elders who help us understand the psychological mechanisms associated with long life and the positive social value long-lived animals bring to their communities.

programme.title: Battle of Midway: The True Story
programme.desc: An inside look at the Battle of Midway, the aircraft used on both sides of the fight, and the dramatic story of one fighter pilot and his pivotal role in America’s first true victory of the Pacific War.

programme.title: Battle of Okinawa in Color
programme.desc: Okinawa was the site of the last battle of the last great war of the 20th century, with a casualty rate in the tens of thousands. Through it all, military cameramen risked their lives to film the conflict, from brutal land combat to fierce kamikaze attacks at sea.

programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: View South Africa's mountain ranges, bustling cities and untamed wildlife from the air. This is South Africa's journey from pre-human skeletons to modern Skyscrapers.

programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it’s the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it’s the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: 6000-LB. Shark
programme.desc: With reports of enormous fat white sharks appearing off the coast of New Zealand, scientists Tom Hird and Leigh de Necker set out to find one of these behemoths.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S4)
programme.desc: Watch Dual Survival as their hosts demonstrate survival skills in a variety of hypothetical scenarios in wilderness around the world.

programme.title: Sw25: Dancing with Sharks
programme.desc: Hosted by Tom Bergeron, "Dancing with Sharks" features five divers partnered with sharks -- including hammerheads and tigers!

programme.title: Ghost Adventures (S13)
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate a menacing jail and a 150-year-old murder in New Mexico.

programme.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic (S2)
programme.desc: Duncan talks Ant into buying a 1991 BMW 30 325i, convinced there's profit to be made. Meanwhile, Ant races to finish the hallway of the farmhouse.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: In a house packed with oddities, Matt finds megalodon teeth, tribal masks and Civil War bullets. The team struggles to make the kitchen functional again.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing the Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: In the Everglades of Florida, Otto and Pascal Feyh hunt an invasive species of snake, the Burmese python, which can grow up to five metres long.

programme.title: Real Time Crime (S2)
programme.desc: In New York, a camera catches a murder, and a killer is brought to justice. In Texas, police use surveillance cameras to track down a gunman.

programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 12 - Brisbane Lions v Fremantle
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season - Round 12 - Western Bulldogs v Collingwood
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: A Brief History of Cricket Down Under: The 80s - The Underarm Ball
programme.desc: February 1, 1981: Australia vs NZ at the MCG. With New Zealand's tail-end batsman needing 6 runs to win off a single ball, Australian skipper Greg Chappell made a decision that is still being talked about over 40 years later.

programme.title: Four Corners - Episode 15
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: The Matter of Facts - Disinformation versus Democracy
programme.desc: Disinformation campaigns prove shockingly innovative in this investigation of digital deception on the international stage - from Paris to the Philippines. We see how, when truth is under attack, democracy is weakened.

programme.title: The World this Week - Episode 19
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Asia News Week - Episode 19
programme.desc: Yvonne Yong brings you a weekly roundup of the stories making news across the Asia region, plus what's trending on social media and making an impact on the culture and the way people live.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia - Episode 8
programme.desc: Ambulance Australia follows the Queensland Ambulance Services, from the Triple Zero Control Centres to paramedics on the road.

programme.title: The World this Week - Episode 19
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 16
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: A Brief History of Cricket Down Under: The 80s - The Underarm Ball
programme.desc: February 1, 1981: Australia vs NZ at the MCG. With New Zealand's tail-end batsman needing 6 runs to win off a single ball, Australian skipper Greg Chappell made a decision that is still being talked about over 40 years later.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 44
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your day. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Daniela Intili.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast - Episode 44
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your day. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Daniela Intili.

programme.title: Insiders - Episode 18
programme.desc: Start your Sunday morning with the show the politicians rely on to find out what's going on. David Speers presents Australia's must-watch political program, joined by a panel of the best political analysts and commentators.

programme.title: Offsiders - Episode 17
programme.desc: More than just the action on the field, Offsiders tackles the week in sport from all angles - from business, politics, marketing, the fans, society, culture, history and the athletes' perspective. Presented by Abbey Gelmi.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show - Episode 16
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Back Roads - North East Tasmania
programme.desc: Heather Ewart is almost blown away by the "Roaring Forties" winds when she visits the North East of Tasmania - an area rich in history, culture and crayfish.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 15
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: ABC News at Noon - Episode 44
programme.desc: Melissa Mackay presents the latest from ABC News on the weekend bringing you today's top stories and coverage of events as they unfold. Plus original reporting, analysis and updated news, sport, weather and information.

programme.title: The World this Week - Episode 19
programme.desc: Girish Sawlani brings you a weekly roundup of international news from an Australian perspective as reported by ABC News correspondents covering the Indo Pacific, Europe, North America, the Middle East, India and Indonesia.

programme.title: Compass - Labassa - If theseWalls Could Talk
programme.desc: Compass was given rare access to Labassa, the historic Renaissance mansion in Melbourne to film many of the remaining tenants. We focus on the post war years of Jewish refugees and 1970's bohemians, artists and performers.

programme.title: Copycat
programme.desc: Holly Hunter is an ambitious cop who tries to draw the forensic psychologist out of her self-imposed exile to help catch a murderer who is copying work of other serial killers.

programme.title: Creature From the Black Lagoon
programme.desc: In one of the most beloved sci-fi horror classics ever, a mysterious amphibious monster escapes captivity in order to be with a scientist’s beautiful female lab assistant.

programme.title: Legion
programme.desc: When God loses faith in mankind he sends his Legion of angels to wipe out the human race for the second time. Man's only hope lies in a group of misfits holed up in a desert diner. With the help of the Archangel Michael, these strangers must deliver a baby they soon realize is the second coming and their last chance at redemption.

programme.title: The Cable Guy
programme.desc: A guy who just wants free cable TV instead gets a new best friend he can't get rid of.

programme.title: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: Sir Richard Attenborough directs Sean Connery, Gene Hackman, Anthony Hopkins and Robert Redford in this gripping and controversial tale about a daring WWII military operation.

programme.title: Robocop 3
programme.desc: A multinational company is determined to evacuate the city of Detroit to build their pet project called Delta City. RoboCop must fight the mega corporation and help the people of Detroit.

programme.title: Inside Man
programme.desc: A police detective, a bank robber and a high-power broker enter high-stakes negotiations after the criminal's brilliant heist spirals into a hostage situation.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, salitang magkatugma, salitang naglalarawan, at pagbabaybay, pati na rin ang iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento at ang pag-uugnay ng sarili sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 6 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa wastong paggamit ng pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang may lapi, at iba't ibang uri ng pangungusap. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng lagom, pagsusuri ng pahayag, at kumuha ng impormasyon sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 6 Math
programme.desc: Understand the nature of solid figures, sequences in forming rules, expressions and equations. Learn more about rate and speed, and of area and surface area of plane and solid or space figures.

programme.title: Grade 6 English
programme.desc: Know how to present reports of differing viewpoints and how to evaluate narratives.

programme.title: Grade 6 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano unawain at pahalagahan ang pagpupunyagi ng mga Pilipino tungo sa pagtugon sa mga suliranin, isyu at hamon ng kasarinlan.

programme.title: Grade 6 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about gravity, friction and how they affect movement of objects, alongside how energy is transformed in simple machines.

programme.title: Grade 8 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano magsuri at maghambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, kung ano ang mga estratehiya sa pagkuha ng impormasyon, paano wastong gamitin ang impormal na komunikasyon, at ang angkop na ekspresyon sa pagbabahagi ng ideya o opinyon tungkol sa mga tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 8 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of axiomatic structure of geometry and triangle congruence.

programme.title: Grade 8 English
programme.desc: Examine what are biases, propagandas, parallelism, and cohesive devices in different types of speech.

programme.title: Grade 8 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Aralin ang naging transpormasyon tungo sa makabagong panahon ng mga bansa at rehiyon sa daigdig bunsod ng paglaganap ng mga kaisipan sa agham, politika, at ekonomiya tungo sa pagbuo ng pandaigdigan kamalayan.

programme.title: Grade 8 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about the particle nature of matter as a basis for explaining properties, physical changes, and structure of substances and mixtures. Discover how to identify a substance according to its atomic structure, and how to use the periodic table of elements to organize and determine the chemical properties of elements.

programme.title: Survivor 50 - EP 1
programme.desc: A record 24 castaways return to Fiji for this milestone 50th anniversary season, ranging from multi-season legends to New Era standouts.

programme.title: Planet Action S4 - EP 13
programme.desc: Planet Action takes you behind the scenes of the best action movies released. Each episode you'll get all the secrets straight from your favorite action heroes, get exclusive trivia and special reports from the most dangerous film sets, and get insight information on how the filmmakers make giant monsters come to life. This show is a sci-fi, cowboy, world-destruction, action-combo that will literally blow your mind!

programme.title: Talking Point - EP 6
programme.desc: Talking Point investigates another burning question from a viewer. Just how dirty are our kitchen sponges? Diana Ser takes viewers’ sponges to a lab for a test.

programme.title: On The Red Dot - EP 4
programme.desc: Three women with chronic pain navigate work, relationships, fertility worries and independence, while managing conditions no one else can see.

programme.title: Arts 21 - EP 453
programme.desc: ARTS 21 is an arts magazine show focusing on the latest news and events on the culture scene.

programme.title: Euromaxx - EP 453
programme.desc: Everything you've ever wanted to know about Europe - from traditions and habits to culture shocks and record breakers.

programme.title: Raid The Cage : Season 01 - EP 2

programme.title: Operandi Gerhana - EP 1

programme.desc: South Korea's no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 315
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 297
programme.desc: The bitter melon formula supports natural detoxification, helps balance blood sugar, and promotes healthy metabolism. The cordyceps capsules boost energy, nourish blood health, and strengthen immunity. programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 304
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 289
programme.desc: Compact, slim, and ready to use straight out of the box. Walk or jog anytime with quiet operation, shock absorption for joint comfort, and adjustable speed and incline. Fold it flat for easy storage—your convenient home fitness solution.

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 10 上山下海过一夜
programme.desc: Penghu boasts stunning basalt and volcanic landscapes, rich with natural and marine treasures. In this episode, the team explores its most unique hidden gems — from rare columnar basalt cliffs and dense stone weir clusters to local delicacies like peanuts stir-fried on cowfish-stone stoves. They dive into Penghu’s blend of ocean beauty and wartime heritage, ending their adventure with an offshore quest to find traces of ancient whales.

programme.title: The Borderless World - EP 2 消失的国界
programme.desc: The news team travels to different continents, interviewing hundreds of countries and cities, providing viewers with materials to understand the world and different perspectives.

programme.title: Red Shoes - EP 30 红色高跟鞋
programme.desc: A story about a heartless mother who betrayed her father and turned away from her sick younger brother for love and desire, and a daughter who dreams of revenge against such mother.

programme.title: Red Shoes - EP 31 红色高跟鞋
programme.desc: A story about a heartless mother who betrayed her father and turned away from her sick younger brother for love and desire, and a daughter who dreams of revenge against such mother.

programme.title: A Good Supper - EP 19 成为饭吧
programme.desc: Jin Yingxin believes that Cui Shujing truly intends to adopt Zhen Qingxiu, leading her to withdraw from the competition. However, Jin Yingxin wins, and before the results are announced, Xu Minjing offers to falsify them if Cui Shuying agrees to give up the adoption.

programme.title: A Good Supper - EP 20 成为饭吧
programme.desc: Under Jin Yingxin's guidance, Li Duojing gets a chef's license and applies for a palace job, where Cui Shujing hires her to use as leverage against Jin Yingxin. Xu Minjing, worries about her son's interest in Jin Yingxin, tries to force her away.

programme.title: The Treasured Voice S6 - EP 3 天赐的声音 第六季
programme.desc: The program engages music partners in collaborative rearrangement and joint performance to exchange skills and creativity. Together, they aim to infuse new energy into Chinese music, allowing audiences to experience emotion and healing through every note and performance. Featuring artistes such as Jane Zhang, Zhang Bi Chen, David Tao, Liu Yu Ning, A-Lin etc.

programme.title: The Sassy Matchmaker - EP 19 媒婆变新娘
programme.desc: YeKang leads his men to attack XingJing gang and AhHuang is badly injured.

programme.title: The Sassy Matchmaker - EP 20 媒婆变新娘
programme.desc: AhNuo explains to NuoLi why Lidi has a deep hatred towards the rebels. A mysterious foreigner helps LiDi, AhNuo and NuoLi to escape.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: The Tale Of Nokdu - EP 4 朝鲜浪漫喜剧–绿豆传
programme.desc: Quan Ludou demonstrates his extraordinary strength to the widows, hoping to join the widow's group for future missions.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 2
programme.desc: Exchanging his corporate image for that of a live streamer, Asri is straddling in unchartered waters. He struggles to find help from his ex-wife, Hani and two home-based sellers who are suspicious of him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 3
programme.desc: Asri wants to reward Kak Sal and Kak Cik for helping him with Raja Bundle's promo video. Hani is hurt when she mistakenly thinks Asri takes her shopping to reward her. Hani feels it is time to move on. Raja Bundle's business begins to bloom, causing the envious Madi Lambung to collaborate with other HBB sellers and try to sway Asri's customers. Asri is devastated when one of his HBB sellers betrays him and abandons Raja Bundle after Asri confirms a big order.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 4
programme.desc: Ema joins Raja Bundle and manages to boost sales for Asri. In return, Asri helps Ema to care for her son, Omar, who is recovering. Hani starts dating again. Amirul and Asri's relationship strains further after Asri jumps to conclusion and accuses Amirul of being a school bully. Asri announces the opening of Raja Bundle's cloud kitchen, much to the delight of his HBB sellers. When Asri bumps into Madi Lambung, he is shocked by the latter's hostility towards him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 5
programme.desc: As the Raja Bundle cloud kitchen takes shape, Asri also needs to expand his team while continuing to balance the other aspects of his life. However, a revelation about his ex-wife Hani is bound to surprise him.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 6
programme.desc: When Madi starts selling cheap, Asri and his HBBs must find a way to overcome this challenge. But in trying to do this, they makes promises to their customers which they have trouble fulfilling. Ema and Omar were welcomed by the sudden arrival of an unexpected person.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 7
programme.desc: The HBBs who have left Madi Lambung begin to sell their products with Asri. Asri's former boss notices Asri's booming business and he is thinking of creating a post specially for Asri. Isnin goes snooping around at the cloud kitchen to see how Madi's former sellers are doing but something else catches his eyes. Zafrul sees hope in his relationship with Hani.

programme.title: Raja Bundle - EP 8
programme.desc: Remi brags about his stints in the filming industry to Asri. Meanwhile, Asri has asked his HBBs to reduce his orders. But the HBBs coax him to reduce his prices so that more will buy. Remi wants Ema to stop baking at the cloud kitchen. Kak Sal tells the HBBs that Asri will be leaving them in the lurch. Kak Sal's rambling unknowingly feeds Madi with information of what is happening at Raja Bundle.

programme.title: Haikal Nak Jadi Cef - EP 9
programme.desc: Trouble brews back on the first day of school after the term holidays. Chef Rahmat's food causes Zaidi and Haikal to go to the nurse's office due to a food allergy. Haikal and Zaidi reconciles reluctantly. This causes Chef Rahmat's to close down his stall, this allowing Mariah to open the new stall in school.
